patch_name: Rise of Avalon Patch 7 / Brimstone & Mist Midseason Update
description: Rise of Avalon Patch 7 / Brimstone & Mist Midseason Update (21 October 2020) — Corrupted Dungeons: New Boss, Enemies, and Traps, Corrupted Dungeon Changes, Smart Cluster Queue Changes, Disarray (Zerg Debuff) Changes, Fishing in Roads of Avalon, New Food Line: Roasts, New Hardcore Expedition Levels Added, Visual Minimap Rework, Crafting Changes, Mobile Improvements and Fixes, Updated Mob Spells, General Improvements, Satchel of Insight Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Corrupted Dungeons: New Boss, Enemies, and Traps

subsections.heading: New boss:

items.text: Demonic Harbinger: Exceptionally powerful and wrathful demon general; wields a massive sword that inflicts heavy bash, slash, and shockwave damage

subsections.searchable_text: New boss: Demonic Harbinger: Exceptionally powerful and wrathful demon general; wields a massive sword that inflicts heavy bash, slash, and shockwave damage

subsections.heading: New enemies:

items.text: Hellhound: Relatively weak enemy, but can call other Hellhounds to itself
Demonic Mauler: Demon with strong regenerative powers that can consume its allies to heal itself
Demonic Predator: Variant of the Spiked Demon that leaps on and slows enemies
Deranged Heretic Arbalist: New Corrupted Heretic that wields dual crossbows

subsections.searchable_text: New enemies: Hellhound: Relatively weak enemy, but can call other Hellhounds to itself Demonic Mauler: Demon with strong regenerative powers that can consume its allies to heal itself Demonic Predator: Variant of the Spiked Demon that leaps on and slows enemies Deranged Heretic Arbalist: New Corrupted Heretic that wields dual crossbows

subsections.heading: New traps:

items.text: Abyssal Impaler: Nasty spike trap that completely ignores armor
Infernal Breach: Fissure that releases waves of magma

subsections.searchable_text: New traps: Abyssal Impaler: Nasty spike trap that completely ignores armor Infernal Breach: Fissure that releases waves of magma

sections.heading: Corrupted Dungeon Changes

items.text: Demonic Shards

subitems.text: Shard health doubled on Slayer difficulty

items.text: Demonic Warlock Boss

subitems.text: Rupture Firewall now inflicts slow instead of knockback
Phase change is more diverse; teleport circle is smaller

items.text: Demonic Underlord
Silence Hazard

subitems.text: Effect area now starts small and grows over time
Outer ring removed; cloud now indicates affected area

items.text: Knockback Hazard

subitems.text: Now grants Infamy and Fame for any mobs killed

items.text: Heretic Thief

subitems.text: "Fan of Knives" spell behavior improved when cast near walls

items.text: Demonic Slaver
The /suicide command is now unavailable during and just before an invasion

sections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeon Changes Demonic Shards Shard health doubled on Slayer difficulty Demonic Warlock Boss Rupture Firewall now inflicts slow instead of knockback Phase change is more diverse; teleport circle is smaller Demonic Underlord Rage bonus damage: 100% → 75% Invincibility removed during Rage cast Silence Hazard Effect area now starts small and grows over time Outer ring removed; cloud now indicates affected area Knockback Hazard Area duration: 0.7s → 0.2s Now grants Infamy and Fame for any mobs killed Heretic Thief "Fan of Knives" spell behavior improved when cast near walls Demonic Slaver Slight size increase The /suicide command is now unavailable during and just before an invasion

sections.heading: Smart Cluster Queue Changes

subsections.heading: per-party level

items.text: Party leaders can now assign a Party Cluster Access Priority for their party as well as for individual members in the Cluster Access Priority UI (accessed via the party leader's player context menu)
Priority Access determines the order in which parties will enter an overcrowded cluster
This gives alliances more control over which forces are moved into the cluster and keeps party structures intact
The Preferred Cluster Access Guild Right has been removed
The queue now moves players from a single contingent either in or out during a given cycle, so players of the same contingent no longer replace each other

subsections.searchable_text: per-party level Party leaders can now assign a Party Cluster Access Priority for their party as well as for individual members in the Cluster Access Priority UI (accessed via the party leader's player context menu) Priority Access determines the order in which parties will enter an overcrowded cluster This gives alliances more control over which forces are moved into the cluster and keeps party structures intact The Preferred Cluster Access Guild Right has been removed The queue now moves players from a single contingent either in or out during a given cycle, so players of the same contingent no longer replace each other

sections.heading: Disarray (Zerg Debuff) Changes

items.text: Disarray is no longer a flat debuff
Instead, it reduces damage output and CC Duration when attacking targets with a lower Disarray level
Against targets with the same or higher Disarray level, Disarray has no impact on your stats
Damage reduction depends on the difference of Disarray levels between attacker and target - the higher the difference, the greater the effect
Increased Disarray player cap; debuff now caps at Level 50 for 450 players

sections.searchable_text: Disarray (Zerg Debuff) Changes Disarray is no longer a flat debuff Instead, it reduces damage output and CC Duration when attacking targets with a lower Disarray level Against targets with the same or higher Disarray level, Disarray has no impact on your stats Damage reduction depends on the difference of Disarray levels between attacker and target - the higher the difference, the greater the effect Increased Disarray player cap; debuff now caps at Level 50 for 450 players

sections.heading: Fishing in Roads of Avalon

items.text: Fishable areas can now be found in every Roads of Avalon zone
Three new fish species exclusive to the Roads of Avalon have been introduced
These fish can be turned into Chopped Fish or used in new recipes (see next section)
NOTE: Due to extensive terrain changes, players in any Roads zone when the update goes live will be transported to one of the zone's portal entrances (does not affect players in Hideouts)

sections.searchable_text: Fishing in Roads of Avalon Fishable areas can now be found in every Roads of Avalon zone Three new fish species exclusive to the Roads of Avalon have been introduced Whitefog Snapper (T3) Clearhaze Snapper (T5) Puremist Snapper (T7) These fish can be turned into Chopped Fish or used in new recipes (see next section) NOTE: Due to extensive terrain changes, players in any Roads zone when the update goes live will be transported to one of the zone's portal entrances (does not affect players in Hideouts)

sections.heading: New Food Line: Roasts

items.text: Raw Chicken, Goose, and Pork can now be roasted to create three new foods: Roast Chicken (T3), Roast Goose (T5), and Roast Pork (T7)

subitems.text: Give Lifesteal that increases with tier and enchantment level
Recipes require base meat + milk + crop

items.text: The new Roads of Avalon fish can also be roasted to create Roasted Whitefog Snapper (T3), Roasted Clearhaze Snapper (T5), and Roasted Puremist Snapper (T7)

subitems.text: Give Lifesteal and Increased Max Health that increase with tier and enchantment level
Recipes require base fish + crop + herb + milk

items.text: Destiny Board nodes added / updated

subitems.text: T3 roasts are available with unlock of Sous Chef node
Higher-level roasts are unlocked by progressing in the Chef node
New specialization node, Roast Chef, added to the Chef node

items.text: Like all foods, roasts can be enchanted with Fish Sauce

sections.searchable_text: New Food Line: Roasts Raw Chicken, Goose, and Pork can now be roasted to create three new foods: Roast Chicken (T3), Roast Goose (T5), and Roast Pork (T7) Give Lifesteal that increases with tier and enchantment level Recipes require base meat + milk + crop The new Roads of Avalon fish can also be roasted to create Roasted Whitefog Snapper (T3), Roasted Clearhaze Snapper (T5), and Roasted Puremist Snapper (T7) Give Lifesteal and Increased Max Health that increase with tier and enchantment level Recipes require base fish + crop + herb + milk Destiny Board nodes added / updated T3 roasts are available with unlock of Sous Chef node Higher-level roasts are unlocked by progressing in the Chef node New specialization node, Roast Chef, added to the Chef node Like all foods, roasts can be enchanted with Fish Sauce

sections.heading: New Hardcore Expedition Levels Added

items.text: Added 3 additional levels of Hardcore Expeditions on top of the current 15
The difficulty of each of these levels (16-18) is approximately 5% higher than the preceding level, with rewards scaled accordingly
Finishing a Level 18 Expedition in time rewards a valuable Loot Chest instead of a new Expedition Map

sections.searchable_text: New Hardcore Expedition Levels Added Added 3 additional levels of Hardcore Expeditions on top of the current 15 The difficulty of each of these levels (16-18) is approximately 5% higher than the preceding level, with rewards scaled accordingly Finishing a Level 18 Expedition in time rewards a valuable Loot Chest instead of a new Expedition Map

items.text: All city minimaps, including Royal Cities, Outlands Cities, and Starter Towns
Player Islands
Guild Islands
City Banks
City Marketplaces

sections.heading: Crafting Changes

items.text: Faction Capes and Royal Armors now retain the quality of the Cape / Armor used to create them

As Faction Capes do not benefit from or contribute to Cape Tailoring Specialization, Fame gain was removed from this crafting process to keep it in line with other conversion processes such as Royal Armors
Increased crafting focus cost of bread to be in line with the nutritional return of other crafting processes.
Butchery focus now available

subitems.text: Farm animals can now be butchered with focus to get more meat. (You don't get your animal back. It's dead. There's no coming back from that.)
As part of this change, the nutritional value of meat has been adjusted to better reflect the overall crafting progression.

sections.searchable_text: Crafting Changes Faction Capes and Royal Armors now retain the quality of the Cape / Armor used to create them As Faction Capes do not benefit from or contribute to Cape Tailoring Specialization, Fame gain was removed from this crafting process to keep it in line with other conversion processes such as Royal Armors Increased crafting focus cost of bread to be in line with the nutritional return of other crafting processes. Butchery focus now available Farm animals can now be butchered with focus to get more meat. (You don't get your animal back. It's dead. There's no coming back from that.) As part of this change, the nutritional value of meat has been adjusted to better reflect the overall crafting progression.

sections.heading: Mobile Improvements and Fixes

items.text: [Android] Delta Patching added, which will affect the future update experience – please see this forum post for more info: forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/138782
Spell effects now show more consistently
Improved memory consumption on lower-end devices; mobile version now remains stable longer in overcrowded zones
Added an option for limiting players visible in crowded cities to General Settings
Added an option for hiding non-guild and alliance members' nametags in cities to Interface Settings
Reactivated intro video
Increased UI scaling of World Map

sections.searchable_text: Mobile Improvements and Fixes [Android] Delta Patching added, which will affect the future update experience – please see this forum post for more info: forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/138782 Spell effects now show more consistently Improved memory consumption on lower-end devices; mobile version now remains stable longer in overcrowded zones Added an option for limiting players visible in crowded cities to General Settings Added an option for hiding non-guild and alliance members' nametags in cities to Interface Settings Reactivated intro video Increased UI scaling of World Map

sections.heading: Updated Mob Spells

items.text: Added unique spells for each Resource Mob type in the Roads of Avalon

subitems.text: Forest Spirit: deploys three piercing roots
Rock Elemental: summons a rock wall
Ore Elemental: summons three exploding crystals

items.text: Avalonian Wizard Bomb spell

subitems.text: Now gives longer warning to leave damage area

sections.searchable_text: Updated Mob Spells Added unique spells for each Resource Mob type in the Roads of Avalon Cougar: pounces at target's position Forest Spirit: deploys three piercing roots Rock Elemental: summons a rock wall Ore Elemental: summons three exploding crystals Dryad: summons a poisonous cloud Avalonian Wizard Bomb spell Now gives longer warning to leave damage area Damage reduced by 20% Pause after casting: 5s → 7s

sections.heading: General Improvements

items.text: Added optional per-language profanity filter that can be toggled via Settings
Updated spell icons for the following E-slot spells
[WINDOWS] Integrated IME keyboard input system (for non-Western languages) added

subitems.text: This option can be turned on / off in Settings
Using the game's native IME input (versus a Windows overlay) solves input issues that existed for certain screen resolutions
Note: this feature is currently only available for Windows version 10.0.19xxx and below 10.0.18xxx

sections.searchable_text: General Improvements Added optional per-language profanity filter that can be toggled via Settings Updated spell icons for the following E-slot spells Double-Bladed Staff - Crescent Slash Black Monk Staff - Fatal Blade Incubus Mace - Shrinking Curse Cursed Skull - Haunting Screams Damnation Staff - Cataclysm Infernal Staff - Contagious Fire Wildfire Staff - Magma Sphere Great Holy Staff - Holy Explosion [WINDOWS] Integrated IME keyboard input system (for non-Western languages) added This option can be turned on / off in Settings Using the game's native IME input (versus a Windows overlay) solves input issues that existed for certain screen resolutions Note: this feature is currently only available for Windows version 10.0.19xxx and below 10.0.18xxx

sections.heading: Satchel of Insight Changes

items.text: Crafting Satchels of Insight now requires only a single Tome of Insight instead of a Randomized Dungeon Map
This change also reverts a prior change that increased drop rates of flat Tier 4 Randomized Dungeon Maps

sections.searchable_text: Satchel of Insight Changes Crafting Satchels of Insight now requires only a single Tome of Insight instead of a Randomized Dungeon Map This change also reverts a prior change that increased drop rates of flat Tier 4 Randomized Dungeon Maps

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Gathering speed penalty, when gathering with a tool one tier lower than that of the resource, has been reduced by half, meaning gathering resources one tier above that of the tool is now faster

When entering a starter city for the first time (i.e. as a new player), the corresponding Royal City will be logged as the "last city" respawn location – re-entering a starter city will not overwrite any already-logged respawn location

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Gathering speed penalty, when gathering with a tool one tier lower than that of the resource, has been reduced by half, meaning gathering resources one tier above that of the tool is now faster When entering a starter city for the first time (i.e. as a new player), the corresponding Royal City will be logged as the "last city" respawn location – re-entering a starter city will not overwrite any already-logged respawn location

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Fixed an issue where mobs could not be indicated with party markers
Corrected terrain in Timberslope Dell (NOTE: players in this zone when the patch is deployed will be moved to the nearest exit)
Updated terrain in some Roads of Avalon zones to correct breaks / flickers
Lucent Hawk (Mistpiercer) now works with quick-cast options as intended
Crafting slider now accurately shows the correct number of craftable items (e.g. in units of 5 for Healing Potions); input box now corrects invalid values
Numerous additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
